input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.6.6.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.6.6.1
            TITLE: all electrical systems (both low voltage and high voltage) must have appropriate overcurrent

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.6.6.1: All electrical systems (both Low Voltage and High Voltage) must have appropriate Overcurrent
EV.6.6.1 All electrical systems (both Low Voltage and High Voltage) must have appropriate Overcurrent 
Protection/Fusing.

final_answer: All electrical systems (both Low Voltage and High Voltage) must have appropriate Overcurrent Protection/Fusing.
